releaseNotes: Fixes a focus-session bug: confirming a recurring checklist item after a session now actually marks it done for today. Was using the wrong completion path (flipped `completed` only, ignored `lastCompletedEpochDay`), so the row stayed visible in the Checklist tab even after you ticked it. Otherwise carries the full v2.13.1 bundle: multi-select reminders per event (Default / None / 5 min / 15 min / 30 min / 1 hr / 2 hr / 4 hr / 1 day / 2 days / 1 week).
